LanguageData.XF_Redstoneinteract.label: XF_Redstoneinteract
LanguageData.XF_RedstonelinkH.label: Redstone Link
LanguageData.XF_RedstonelinkH.description: Connected to the redstone, I'll go play games with it in a bit.
LanguageData.XF_BloodofPhoenix.label: Blood of Phoenix
LanguageData.XF_BloodofPhoenix.description: Persistent nanomachine infection significantly enhances physical capabilities, but the host experiences extreme pain.
LanguageData.XF_NanoWeakUp.label: Nanomech Weak Up
LanguageData.XF_NanoWeakUp.description: The nanomachines inside the body are awakening. They will repair a severe wound or missing part of the host and significantly enhance the host's physical abilities. After a period of time, they will enter dormancy again.
LanguageData.XF_Tgood.label: Vocal Infection
LanguageData.XF_Tgood.description: Is this the power of music?
LanguageData.XF_Tbad.label: Vocal Pollution
LanguageData.XF_Sing.label: Singing
LanguageData.XF_Sing.description: Her singing can be a blessing or a curse...
LanguageData.XF_SingBad.label: Singing
LanguageData.XF_SingBad.description: Her singing can be a blessing or a curse...
LanguageData.XF_BlackAppleInterest.label: Abyssal Gaze
LanguageData.XF_BlackAppleInterest.description: This one has been influenced by the black apple, becoming disoriented and delusional.
LanguageData.XF_BlackAppleInterest.stages.0.label: psychic infection
LanguageData.XHCcut.label: Freeze
LanguageData.XHCcut.description: Slow movement due to decreased body temperature.
LanguageData.XHpull.label: Visceral Pulled
LanguageData.XHpull.description: Visceral are pulled causing severe pain.
LanguageData.XFBlind.label: Flash Blind
LanguageData.XGVEBlind.label: Rock Your Eyes
LanguageData.XGVEBlind.stages.1.label: Bling Bling!
LanguageData.XGVEBlind.stages.2.label: Too Shiny!
LanguageData.XGVEBlind.stages.3.label: I'm Blind
LanguageData.XGVEBlind.stages.4.label: My Fxxking Eyes!
LanguageData.XFZbomb.label: Frost
LanguageData.XFZbomb.description: Slow movement due to decreased body temperature.
